_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of Political, Military, Economic, Social, PMESII and Counter-Terrorism Analytical Framework  analytical constructs and their use in assessing the operational environment.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of program management frameworks (PMI, SAFe, Agile) and how they are adapted for data and AI programs that involve technical uncertainty, iterative development, and cross-functional dependencies.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI OP domain. OP-K-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-K-008 (LS, cosine: 0.440), AB-S-003 (AB, cosine: 0.430).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.3/10 (raw 0.332). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [analytical, assessing, constructs, counter, economic, environment] vs WIDAI-only terms [adapted, agile, ai, cross, data, dependencies] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.854 (P=0.854, R=0.854). Balanced P/R — the 21-word DCWF element and 27-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (67.4%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Knowledge of Political, Military, Economic, Social, PMESII and Counter-Terrorism" and "Knowledge of program management frameworks (PMI, SAFe, Agile) and how they are a". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.476 > STS 0.332 (gap +0.144). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [knowledge] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 7.0%. Shared tokens: [knowledge]. DCWF-only: [analytical, assessing, constructs, counter, economic, environment]. WIDAI-only: [adapted, agile, ai, cross, data, dependencies].
